name: Python Test

on: [push]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: windows

    steps:
    - name: Code holen
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Python installieren
      uses: actions/setup-python@v4
      with:
        python-version: '3.10'

    - name: Programm ausführen
      run: python brainbuster.py
